property.name: isOpen
property.label: Is Open
property.description: Set to true to show the modal by default

property.name: showTriggerButton
property.label: Show Trigger Button
property.description: Set to true to show the 'Add Template' button

property.name: folderId
property.label: Folder Id
property.description: Id of the SMS Template Folder to default the Folder picklist to
